response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced engineer (15+ years) with strong craftsmanship, testing culture, and some high-throughput systems work, but the profile does not match the core of this Principal IC6 role: there is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership at enterprise scale. Most recent work is senior-level full-stack product engineering, which falls short of the principal-level growth/experimentation systems scope.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at dunnhumby)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, mentoring and teaching
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platform experience
No demonstrated principal-level leadership of multi-team, cross-product initiatives
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis depth

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal IC6 scope
Solid engineering fundamentals and systems experience
